/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/modulation_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmodulation_plugin.so -o libmodulation_plugin.so CMakeFiles/modulation_plugin.dir/modulation_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modulation_plugin.dir/modulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modulation_plugin.dir/modulation_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
